TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Haji_Hassanal_Bolkiah_Mu'izzaddin_Waddaulah, title = Haji_Hassanal_Bolkiah_Mu'izzaddin_Waddaulah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Haji_Hassanal_Bolkiah_Mu'izzaddin_Waddaulah} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 7, Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Brunei ta' misuw hya' ga Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1967 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 7, Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Brunei ta' misuw hya' ga Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1967 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ħaji ħas~ɕs~ɕanal βolkiaħ muʔizza**in wa**aulaħ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βrunei taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ħaji ħas~ɕs~ɕanal βolkiaħ muʔizza**in wa**aulaħ, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
